file: 1049_Sun 等 - 2023 - The gradient fabrication and optimization of metal-acid bifunctional catalysts for the hydrogenation.txt

experiments.description: 在固定床反应器中，使用梯度优化的双功能催化剂（Pt-HPW-AS-I, Pt-WAS-II, Pt-WHSS-III, WHSS@Pt-IV）对正十六烷（n-C16）进行加氢处理，以生产生物喷气燃料组分（C9-C14）。反应在氢气氛围（2 MPa）下进行，通过改变反应温度（310-440°C）来调整反应严重度。
experiments.text_snippet: The hydrocracking/isomerization of n-C16 was carried out in a fixed bed... 1.81 g catalyst (40-60 mesh) was filled into the reaction under the H2 atmosphere with a pressure of 2 MPa and a flow rate of 64 mL/min... the feed n-C16 was pumped into the reactor with a flow rate of 0.02 mL/min (WHSV = 0.5 h-1)... The reaction severity was adjusted by controlling the temperature from 310 ◦C to 440 ◦C.

Catalyst loading.original: 1.81 g (40-60 mesh) for Pt-WAS-II, Pt-WHSS-III, WHSS@Pt-IV

Product yield.original: Jet fuel component yield: up to 37 wt.% (WHSS@Pt-IV)

Product Selectivity.value: Improved isomer selectivity with gradient optimization
Product Selectivity.original: Improved isomer selectivity with gradient optimization

Catalyst stability.original: Excellent (100 h stability test at 350°C for WHSS@Pt-IV)
